name: Seasoned Chips with Lone Star 'Caviar'
recipeIngredient: 2 medium tomatoes, seeded and chopped (2 cups)
1 can black-eyed peas, rinsed and drained (15 oz.)
1 medium green bell pepper, chopped (1-1/3 cups)
1 to 2 jalapeno peppers, seed & finely chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Caviar: In a medium mixing bowl, combine tomatoes, peas, bell pepper, onions, cilantro, lemon juice, serrano peppers, jalapeno peppers, garlic, and 1/4 teaspoon cumin with salt. Cover with plastic wrap and chill at least 4 hours, stirring occasionally.
2. Chips: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. In a large plastic food-storage bag or paper bag, combine remaining 2 teaspoons cumin, chili powder, and garlic powder. Set aside.
- Spray both sides of each tortilla with vegetable cooking spray.
- Cut each tortilla into 8 wedges.
- Place wedges in the bag and shake to coat evenly.
- Arrange 32 wedges in a single layer on a baking sheet. Bake for 7 to 9 minutes, or until light golden brown. Repeat with remaining tortilla wedges.
3. Serve chips with Caviar.
Makes 16 servings: 111 calories, 1 g fat, 2 g fiber per serving; 8.1% protein, fat, and carbs (CFF).
